lunar_to_lunar.message0: Gregorian calendar %1 year %2 month %3 day → lunar date
lunar_to_lunar.tooltip: Convert the Gregorian calendar date to a lunar calendar string, such as "July 15th"

lunar_ganzhi_year.tooltip: Convert the lunar year to a string of zodiac signs, such as "Bingwu (horse) year"

lunar_jieqi_name.message0: Gregorian calendar %1 year %2 month %3 day → solar term name
lunar_jieqi_name.tooltip: Get the name of the solar term corresponding to the specified Gregorian calendar date. Return an empty string on non-solar days.

lunar_is_jieqi.message0: Gregorian calendar %1 year %2 month %3 day whether it is a solar term
lunar_is_jieqi.tooltip: Determine whether the specified Gregorian calendar date is a solar term

lunar_jieqi_day.message0: Calendar year %1 Solar term number %2 → Solar term date
lunar_jieqi_day.tooltip: Get the Gregorian calendar date (number) of the Nth solar term (0-23) in the specified year, Xiaohan=0, Dahan=1, Beginning of Spring=2...

lunar_weekday.message0: Gregorian calendar %1 year %2 month %3 day → week
lunar_weekday.tooltip: Calculate the day of the week, return Chinese characters like "一" or "六"

lunar_weekday_num.message0: Gregorian calendar %1 year %2 month %3 day → week (number)
lunar_weekday_num.tooltip: Calculate the day of the week, return 0 = day 1 = Monday 2 = Tuesday ... 6 = Saturday

lunar_days_in_month.message0: Gregorian calendar year %1 month %2 → number of days in the month
lunar_days_in_month.tooltip: Get the number of days in a certain month of the Gregorian calendar (automatically handle leap years)

lunar_jieqi_name_by_index.message0: Solar term number %1 → Solar term name
lunar_jieqi_name_by_index.tooltip: Get the names of solar terms by serial number (0-23): Xiaohan=0, Dahan=1, Beginning of Spring=2...

lunar_zodiac_name.tooltip: Get the zodiac sign corresponding to the year, such as "Horse" and "Ox"
